_comment: Optional overrides. Copy this file to config.json and edit. All fields are optional; delete the ones you don't need. Defaults work out of the box for Microsoft Scout / OpenClaw.
_home: Agent home folder. Default: %USERPROFILE%\.copilot. You can also set the SCOUT_COMPANION_HOME environment variable.
_processNames: Process names of your agent's desktop window, matched case-insensitively.
_windowHints: Fallback window-title substrings used if the process name doesn't match.
_labels: Button captions the companion clicks for Allow / Deny inside the agent window. Scout currently shows: Allow, Allow for session, Allow everywhere, Deny. Order matters: the first match wins, so the one-time 'Allow' is preferred.
_activeWindowSeconds: Treat the session as 'working' if its event log changed within this many seconds.
_pollIntervalMs: How often (ms) to poll the event stream and window focus.
_exitWhenAgentGone: Automatically close the companion shortly after the agent app quits. Pair with Watch-Scout.ps1 (in the Startup folder) to tie the companion's lifetime to Scout: it opens when Scout starts and closes when Scout exits.
_exitGraceSeconds: How long the agent must stay gone before the companion shuts itself down (covers restarts and brief window flaps).
